Work Experience
AI Engineer — Maharshi Industries Pvt. Ltd.June 2025 – Present
•AI Based Quality Inspection System : Engineered AI-driven quality inspection solutions using RF-DETR,
PyTorch, OpenCV, and Vision-Language Models (Qwen, Gemma) for automated defect detection, analysis,
and reporting.
•DivyaChakshu AI : Developed and deployed real-time surveillance systems for defense applications, including

object detection, facial recognition, ANPR, and multi-camera video analytics using RGB and thermal imagery.
•Color Change Detecetion : Developed an AI-based color change detection system for DRDE Gwalior, automating
chemical resistance testing and enabling remote, contactless inspection through robotic integration.
Data Science Intern — BISAG-NJanuary 2025 – April 2025
•Developed and optimized deep learning models for geospatial AI applications, focusing on object detection and

image segmentation using satellite imagery.
•Built a rooftop detection system using YOLOv8, YOLOv11, DeepLabV3+, and U-Net, leveraging Roboflow for
dataset annotation and management.
•Evaluated model performance using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, IoU, and mAP, while utilizing QGIS, SNAP,
OpenCV, TensorFlow, and PyTorch for geospatial data analysis.
Projects
Ask ANERI – AI Health & Skincare Chatbot

Projects
Ask ANERI – AI Health & Skincare Chatbot
Developed an AI-powered health and skincare chatbot using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain,
ChromaDB, and Large Language Models (LLMs). Built a custom knowledge base covering skincare, acne, PCOS, hor-
monal health, and women’s wellness, enabling context-aware question answering through semantic search, intelligent
document retrieval, and personalized response generation. .
Collaborative Filtering Recommendation System

Collaborative Filtering Recommendation System
Built a movie recommendation system using similarity-based collaborative filtering and machine learning techniques
to identify relationships between user preferences and movie features. Developed a personalized recommendation
pipeline that improved recommendation relevance and user experience.
Rooftop Detection with Light Weight & Other Deep Learning Models on Satellite Imagery

Developed a rooftop detection system using YOLOv8s-seg, YOLOv11s-seg, DeepLabV3+ (ResNet50), and U-Net
(ResNet50) on satellite imagery. Annotated data in Roboflow (COCO & YOLO formats) for precise roof segmentation
and integrated geospatial analysis to enhance mapping accuracy and support urban planning.
